This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Empty deviceRequest and encryptionInfo are handled gracefully.
  assert_true: Expected a non-abort rejection, got Error: Error expected true got false
[FAIL] Single-character base64url strings are handled gracefully.
  assert_true: Expected a non-abort rejection, got Error: Error expected true got false
[FAIL] Base64 with padding characters (invalid base64url) is handled gracefully.
  assert_true: Expected a non-abort rejection, got Error: Error expected true got false
[FAIL] Standard base64 characters (+/) instead of base64url (-_) are handled gracefully.
  assert_true: Expected a non-abort rejection, got Error: Error expected true got false
[FAIL] Truncated CBOR (incomplete array header) is handled gracefully.
  assert_true: Expected a non-abort rejection, got Error: Error expected true got false
[FAIL] CBOR unsigned integer (wrong major type) is handled gracefully.
  assert_true: Expected a non-abort rejection, got Error: Error expected true got false
[FAIL] Indefinite-length CBOR array is handled gracefully.
  assert_true: Expected a non-abort rejection, got Error: Error expected true got false
[FAIL] CBOR with reserved additional information (28) is handled gracefully.
  assert_true: Expected a non-abort rejection, got Error: Error expected true got false
[FAIL] EncryptionInfo with protocol tag != 'dcapi' is handled gracefully.
  assert_true: Expected a non-abort rejection, got Error: Error expected true got false
[FAIL] EncryptionInfo that is a CBOR map instead of array is handled gracefully.
  assert_true: Expected a non-abort rejection, got Error: Error expected true got false
[FAIL] Very large (1MB) deviceRequest is handled gracefully without hanging.
  assert_true: Expected a non-abort rejection, got Error: Error expected true got false
Harness: the test ran to completion.
